Story quest chain

Systems7
Targets13
Rewards9

Part 1: The Ultimate Poison: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1000-1200

Defeat 75 Baby Moth lvl 7 in Kritillian

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Warp Gate in Kritillian.
  2. Go to Kritillian.
  3. Defeat 75 Baby Moth lvl 7.
  4. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 2.

Description

Xhargreg: ”What a lovely system! Think of all the possible opportunities here.. all those cute little bugs.. hmm although forget about that ‘little’ part… Hehehehergrgh. Uhm, right, what was I doing? Oh, right, talking to you... see those green lite cute moth like insects out there? Doesn't the color of their poison just look so exciting? Gather poison from 75 of those and I might… or might not reward you…"

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Good job, now bring all that poison to me at my research station in Zergilin"

Part 2: The Ultimate Poison: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 600-800

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 3.

Description

Xhargreg: ”Good job, now bring all that poison to me at my research station in Zergilin."

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Why hello there! Who might you be? Oh look at all that green poison!!! Gimme! I need a few seconds to examine it..."

*45 minutes later*

Xhargreg: ”Why are you still here? Stop bothering me I’m busy!"

*2 hours and 50 minutes later*

Xhargreg: ”This poison is fantastic! I just came up with a new research topic, let’s make the perfect poison!

What are you talking about? A reward? Sure, here are few bug legs, enjoy!"

Part 3: The Ultimate Poison: Part 3

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Defeat 8 Moth Alpha lvl 18, Moth Alpha lvl 13 in Hozar

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Hozar.
  2. Defeat 8 Moth Alpha lvl 18, Moth Alpha lvl 13.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 4.

Description

Xhargreg: ”Let’s make the perfect poison! I’m sure you don’t have anything better to do anyway.

The bigger moths are bound to have more potent poisons, right? Perfect logic! I remember seeing large moths in Hozar. Go there and kill 8 Moth Alphas. Why 8 you say? Well 8 is a perfectly symmetrical number, therefore it’s the ideal choice."

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 4: The Ultimate Poison: Part 4

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1000-1200

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 5.

Description

Return to Xhargregs Research Station in Zergilin with your findings.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Worthless! This goo isn’t even poisonous. You want a reward for a failure? Fine you can have a nice little reward… yeeees…"

Part 5: The Ultimate Poison: Part 5

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 4000-4200 + 8 Flux

Defeat 888 Baby Ice Moth lvl 10, Ice Moth lvl 16, Ice Moth lvl 11

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 888 Baby Ice Moth lvl 10, Ice Moth lvl 16, Ice Moth lvl 11.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 6.

Description

Xhargreg: ”Here’s your reward; you’ll get to kill 888 ice-moths and gather their rather peculiar ice venom. Happy? What? No?? You can even keep their squishy eyes for yourself! What could be better? Now get going, I need a nap."

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Finally... that took forever... Zzzz.. are you even trying? Return to me with the poison... and please... do it before the world ends... "

Part 6: The Ultimate Poison: Part 6

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1000-1200

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 7.

Description

Return to Xhargregs Research Station in Zergilin with your findings.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Why did you wake me up??? Oh, excellent, this is much more interesting..

But still not good enough. While you were slacking off killing those 888 ice-moths I did some real work and discovered that there are some extremely toxic Macrophages around the planet Pouleno. Go there and play with them a bit, won’t ya? Hehe…"

Part 7: The Ultimate Poison: Part 7

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Defeat 8 Macrophage lvl 14 in Zergilin

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to kC4A62Y5NEeJc--67xaryA.
  2. Defeat 8 Macrophage lvl 14.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 8.

Description

Kill 8 Macrophages around Polueno

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Oh, you’re still alive? Good… I think. Now come back here so I can reward you properly. "

Part 8: The Ultimate Poison: Part 8

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 9.

Description

Return to Xhargregs Research station in Zergilin with the Macrophage toxins. Could there possibly be a real reward this time?

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Most exquisit… this venom is just amazing. A single gram could kill thousands… and you brought back several barrels. I must be the luckiest person in the world… heheherhghrhgh.

It has a very strange property of transferring the victims vital energies to the infector... I’m sure this could be highly useful if weaponized… luckily I love making weapons… what could be more fun?

Oh, right, a reward… hmmm… have this wasp stinger… Now for next part"

Part 9: The Ultimate Poison: Part 9

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 6200-6800 + 16 Flux

Defeat 512 Black Moth lvl 17, Dread Moth lvl 24 in Mitrilion

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Mitrilion.
  2. Defeat 512 Black Moth lvl 17, Dread Moth lvl 24.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 10.

Description

Xhargreg: ”Do you know what’s annoying? There’s some kind of exploding moths in Mitrilion.. Really annoying, they blew up my scout drones. How am I supposed to scout for toxins with those things around? Go kill them… all of them."

Completion

Xhargreg: ”What took you so long? Well… fine fine, no need to get upset... good job... have a vial of Cyanide… it’s always good to have one of those… who knows when you end up attending a dull dinner party... hehehgghruhu

Meanwhile I discovered something useful, there’s some strange kind of heavily armoured insectoids in Vibrilion, I believe they hold the key to the ultimate poison. "

Part 10: The Ultimate Poison: Part 10

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 5600-5800 + 3 Flux

Defeat 8 Daemon lvl 27 in Vibrilian

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to VLhvrIrOmkmxe1a38FthyQ.
  2. Defeat 8 Daemon lvl 27.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 11.

Description

Go to Vibrilian and kill 8 Deamons, be careful they can be a bit nasty

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 11: The Ultimate Poison: Part 11

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 12.

Description

Return to Xhargregs Research Station in Zergilin with the Deamon toxins.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Good good, I’ve come quite far in my research, just look at this.. *dribbles some unspeakable liquid on the floor*... oh and don’t mind the corpse pile in the corner over there… they all volunteered in the name of science.

Do you know of the Nezerians? I might have been working with them, a long time ago… before some.. hundreds of unfortunate and *totally* accidental deaths… Hehehehghrhrhgr... anyway since I left them I believe they have perfected their bioengineering equipment. I need you to go and *borrow* some of that equipment, you should be able to salvage enough from one Battle Ship."

Part 12: The Ultimate Poison: Part 12

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 5600-5800 + 3 Flux

Defeat 1 Nezerian Battleship lvl 49 in Sarkinon

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to zeP_LJ5p7kG0XosKAU0vCw.
  2. Defeat 1 Nezerian Battleship lvl 49.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 13.

Description

Go and *borrow* some bioengineering equipment from a Nezerian Battle Ship in Sarkinon.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 13: The Ultimate Poison: Part 13

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 14.

Description

Return to Xhargregs Research Station in Zergilin with the bioengineering equipment.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Excellent job there, just the equipment I needed. I’m certain I can create a quite unique weapon with this. A weaponized gland capable of releasing a cloud of parasitic venom able to leech the targets life energy. However we still need a few more biological components… nothing in particularly difficult. Have you heard of “The Cleaner”? The Nezerians created that bio-engineering marvel to deal with their previous failed experiment… which I totally did not have anything to do with at all… erhhm yes, anyway there is a secret Nezerian research facility at x: -318, y: 752 in Sarkinon, where they are experimenting on Macrophages similar to the ones attached to the Cleaner. Gather samples from these. And here, a little bonus for your excellent work! Yes! It’s a bug leg! Enjoy!"

Part 14: The Ultimate Poison: Part 14

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 6200-6800 + 16 Flux

Defeat 8 Experimental Macrophage lvl 62 in Sarkinon

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Sarkinon.
  2. Defeat 8 Experimental Macrophage lvl 62.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 15.

Description

Go to the secret Nezerian research facility at x: -318, y: 752 in Sarkinon, gather samples from 8 Experimental Macrophages.

*hint: You need to figure out some way to deal with their insane healing abilities.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Odd… you’re alive? You haven’t mutated into some horrid abomination? Sigh… I guess you can’t have everything... I might have forgot to tell you about their mutagenic poison… Anyway return here with the Macrophage samples”

Part 15: The Ultimate Poison: Part 15

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 16.

Description

Return to Xhargregs Research station in Zergilin with the Macrophage samples.

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Look at this! Just what was missing… I’ll get on with creating the ultimate toxin… I came up with an excellent name for the weapon… the Death Cloud! You know… a cloud… that makes things die? Erhhm... Death… Cloud...? You get it?

While I work on the Death Cloud… could you do me a small favour? Go kill the Dread Moths in Cynapsian. Maybe... about… ALL of them... should be enough… Did I mention I hate those bloody exploding moths? Always killing my poor poor scout drones”

Part 16: The Ultimate Poison: Part 16

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 12400-12800 + 16 Flux

Defeat 256 Dread Moth lvl 52 in Cynapsian

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to TIDKB3-qvkSxtEs4t31Lag.
  2. Defeat 256 Dread Moth lvl 52.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock The Ultimate Poison: Part 17.

Description

Xhargreg: ”Go kill the Dread Moths in Cynapsian. Maybe... about… ALL OF THEM... should be enough…”

Completion

Xhargreg: ”Great news everyone! I've discovred a new kind of wasps in my kitchen. Come back and check them out right away! Oh... and the Death Cloud is done, you can pick it up at the same time…"

Part 17: The Ultimate Poison: Part 17

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Poison Part 16

Travel / deliver to Xhargregs Research Station

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Xhargregs Research Station.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.

Description

Return to Xhargregs Research station in Zergilin and check out the new wasps he discovered. (You can also pick up the Death Cloud)

Completion

Xhargreg: ”What do you think? Aren't these giant wasps amazing? Hmmm.. wonder if the mutagenic poison you brought back last time had anything to do with it... are you really sure you don't wanna try some?

Oh, right, right, here you go, the Death Cloud… one of my finest creations… I hope you enjoy it! It was almost endurable to work with you… perhaps you could be of further use sometime in the future… once a way to re enter Fulzar has been discovered. Oh and if you encounter any Nezerians.. please do feel free to test the Death Cloud on them… Hehehehhrgrhghghgh..."

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
